baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare it against a no-skill baseline or previous-version snapshot using the same prompt and inputs.

evals.prompt: Extract a ubiquitous language glossary from this conversation and save it.
evals.expected_output: A UBIQUITOUS_LANGUAGE.md glossary with canonical terms, definitions, ambiguities, and proposed resolutions.
assertions: Identifies domain terms from the conversation.
